_README: SCHEMA + field docs for a project record. Copy the shape below for new projects. This file documents each field; it is not a real project.

_field_docs.id: Stable unique id, e.g. 'project_apex_001'. Must match the catalog card id.
_field_docs.goals: List of strings — what the project is trying to achieve.
_field_docs.decisions: List of {text, date} — locked-in decisions worth remembering.
